violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of use to be professionally serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice bins at large bar, and dough hook) were observed with an accumulation of water and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice bins are to be cleaned & sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2024

Utensils were observed stored on unclean walls. Cleaned equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean location, where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The large mixing bowl was not in good repair, with dents impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2024
The gasket on the door of the tall freezer was not in good repair (torn). New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: floor mixer underside of kitchen shelves counters near the poles for the shelves broiler lids and container at grill New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The ceiling, ceiling light cover, and fan covers have an accumulation of dust, mold, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2024
One light beneath the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2024
Ceiling light covers in the kitchen are in poor repair, cracked with pieces missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2024
